creator: m.tsatsenko@gmail.com
text:
PORTEPOCH was removed accidentally
The patch is based on some old revision of wine-devel port  (1.6-rc5)
where PORTSCOUT is missing for some reason. I was not sure how to
handle this.
Whitespace is fixed

Also wine stable port perhaps should depend on emulators/wine-gecko
not emulators/wine-gecko-devel

See corrected patch

-- 
Mikhail
